notes: Expanded seed benchmark for auditing extraction, retrieval, attachment, and launch-scope gating quality. Still directional rather than statistically stable.

cases.title: Fed expected to hold key rate unchanged Wednesday
acceptable_market_patterns: no change in fed interest rates after the april 2026 meeting
no change in fed interest rates after the march 2026 meeting
cases.notes: Should attach only to same-meeting or near-meeting Fed decision markets, not year-end rate-range markets.

cases.title: Fed keeps rates on hold, Powell says he will remain in place until successor confirmed
acceptable_market_patterns: no change in fed interest rates after the april 2026 meeting
no change in fed interest rates after the march 2026 meeting
cases.notes: Good attach target for exact Fed-decision markets. Powell succession side claims should not dominate.

cases.title: Fed leaves rates steady, cites solid growth
acceptable_market_patterns: no change in fed interest rates
cases.notes: Another same-meeting macro case. Related meeting markets are acceptable only if clearly tied to the January decision.

cases.title: Supreme Court decision on Donald Trump tariff powers
cases.notes: Borderline case. Exact market may not exist, but related tariff/court context could be useful if clearly aligned.

cases.title: Oil prices plunge following U.S.-Iran ceasefire
cases.notes: Fallback/related-context case. Exact oil-price markets may not exist; conflict-linked markets could still be useful if clearly connected.

cases.title: U.S. fighter jet shot down over Iran, one crew member rescued so far
cases.notes: Fallback/related-context case. Exact operational-war claims may not map cleanly, but aligned escalation markets may still be reasonable.

cases.title: CNN transcript page
cases.notes: Transcript pages often contain multiple disconnected claims. v1 should generally abstain.

cases.title: Ukraine ceasefire call is aimed at forcing Putin to reveal his war goals to Trump
cases.notes: Analysis framing rather than a single crisp claim. Good abstention test.

cases.title: Who is the 2026 Masters favorite? Here's who leads betting odds
cases.notes: In-scope sports attach case. The surfaced market should stay in the Masters outright-winner family.

cases.title: 2026 NFL Draft top-five pick odds: Two linemen creating uncertainty
cases.notes: In-scope sports attach case. This article is directly about the market family we want to surface.

cases.title: Bitcoin topped $70,000 today. More Wall Street firms are building up crypto services
cases.notes: In-scope asset-price case. Exact same-day threshold markets may not exist, but BTC-related market context should be plausible.

cases.title: Trump endorses ex-Fox News host Steve Hilton in California governor's race
cases.notes: In-scope election case. The endorsement itself is not the market, but the governor-race market family is relevant context.

cases.title: Tesla is designing a smaller, lower-cost SUV. The move could signal a major strategy shift
cases.notes: In-scope company-milestone abstention case. This is strategic reporting and rumor-shaped product planning, not a clean externally resolvable market event.
